name: Grilled Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Place flank steak in a glass dish.
2. Combine the next nine ingredients; pour over meat.
3. Cover and refrigerate 4 hours or overnight.
4. Drain and discard marinade.
5. Grill meat over hot coals until it reaches desired doneness: about 4 minutes per side for medium, 5 minutes per side for medium-well.
6. Meanwhile, in a skillet, saute onion and peppers in oil for 3-4 minutes or until crisp-tender.
7. Slice meat into thin strips across the grain; place on tortillas.
8. Top with vegetables; roll up and serve immediately.
